heading: Omitted
label: 615 to 615e Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 615, , , authorized construction, operation, and maintenance of Washita River Basin Project, Oklahoma.act Feb. 25, 1956, ch. 71, § 170 Stat. 28Section 615a, , , related to allocation of construction costs, adjustments, and repayment of construction costs.act Feb. 25, 1956, ch. 71, § 270 Stat. 28Section 615b, , , required construction in units or stages.act Feb. 25, 1956, ch. 71, § 370 Stat. 30Section 615c, , , related to construction, operation, and maintenance of public parks and recreational facilities on lands adjacent to Washita project.act Feb. 25, 1956, ch. 71, § 470 Stat. 30Section 615d, , , related to expenditures for Foss and Fort Cobb Reservoirs.act Feb. 25, 1956, ch. 71, § 570 Stat. 30Section 615e, , , related to authorization of appropriations for this project.act Feb. 25, 1956, ch. 71, § 670 Stat. 30

Foss Reservoir Master Conservancy District; Feasibility Study; Revision of Repayment Contract, , , directed Secretary of the Interior to conduct feasibility studies in areas serving Foss Reservoir Master Conservancy District to determine alternative water sources and methods of alleviating problems associated with poor quality and supply of water stored in Foss Reservoir, provided for assistance to Foss Reservoir Master Conservancy District in developing an adequate interim water supply, and authorized Secretary to use any available funds to carry out this Act.Pub. L. 90–31182 Stat. 124May 18, 1968
